🌍 Location: Remote
📍 Open to: 🇮🇳 🇵🇰 🇳🇬 🇰🇪 🇪🇬 🇬🇭 🇧🇩 🇹🇷 🇲🇽
💼 Type: Contract (Freelance)
⏱ Commitment: 20–40 hrs/week (PST overlap required)
📅 Duration: ~3 months (extendable)
🔥 This is where real ML engineering meets cutting-edge AI
You’ll be:
✔️ Building end-to-end ML pipelines (data → model → deployment)
✔️ Working with real datasets & production-grade systems
✔️ Optimizing models for performance, scalability & accuracy
✔️ Collaborating with product & engineering teams
✔️ Applying latest ML techniques to real-world problems
🎯 What they’re looking for:
4+ years in Machine Learning / Data Science
Strong Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn)
Solid understanding of ML concepts (NLP, CV, forecasting, etc.)
Experience with model tuning, feature engineering & evaluation
Ability to build scalable ML systems

Deep Learning (CNNs, Transformers) | PySpark | Databricks | Kaggle experience
🚀 Real talk:
If you’re already working on ML and want to step into high-impact AI systems, this is a strong move.
👉 Apply here: [https://lnkd.in/efYANfZ2]

🚀 We’re Hiring: Game Developer (Engines) – Remote | Contract
Are you passionate about building immersive game environments and working on cutting-edge AI projects? This is your chance to be part of something BIG!
🎮 Role: Game Developer (Engines)
🌍 Location: Remote
📄 Type: Contract
💡 What You'll Do:
Build and optimize game environments using Godot & Panda3D
Develop advanced gameplay mechanics with Python & GDScript
Collaborate with AI teams to create intelligent training environments
Work on real-time simulations, physics systems, and AI-driven gameplay
🔥 What We’re Looking For:
Hands-on experience with Godot and/or Panda3D
Strong scripting skills in Python & GDScript
Experience with AI integration in game engines
Passion for innovation, performance, and scalable systems
✨ Bonus Points:

👉 Apply Now:

Application Link: https://t.mercor.com/gdWnS
Interview Process:
The vetting process involves a technical interview conducted by a human; you will not be allowed to use an AI IDE (Integrated Development Environment) but you will be allowed to use LLMs or Stack Overflow

Here are more details about the role:
You must be able to commit around 20 hours per week for this role
This contract is expected to last at least 1 month
Successful contributions increase the odds that you are selected on future projects with Mercor
The vetting process involves a 90 minute human interview centered on Python - you will hear back within two weeks
With respect to pay and legal status:
This role will pay $100/h based on experience

📢 HIRING - Official Announcement: R&S Engineering Pvt Ltd

MISSION: BUILDING INDIA’S BLUE ECONOMY 2026

R&S Engineering Pvt Ltd (Founder: Thangavel Ramesh, IIT Madras), ஒரு ஆழமான கடல்சார் தொழில்நுட்ப நிறுவனம் (Deep-Tech Marine Infrastructure Company), இந்தியாவின் கடல் வளத்தைப் பாதுகாக்கப் புதிய மைல்கல்லை எட்டுகிறது.

The Vision:
In line with the Union Budget 2026 and India’s vision for a $10 Trillion Economy, we are scaling our operations to handle:

₹1000 Crore in Marine EPC (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) Execution.

₹100 Crore in High-Level Strategic Marine & Offshore Consultancy.

Seeking National Builders (MEN – Job Creation)

Tier 1 Experts: Deep-Tech Experts, Marine Structural Engineers (IIT/NIT Background), and AI-Robotics Architects.

Execution Force: Project Managers, Site Engineers, and Quality Control Officers for massive coastal projects.

Skilled Technicians: Marine-certified Welders, Fabricators, and Certified Commercial Divers.

Our Goal: To create 500+ direct jobs and empower the next generation of Marine Engineering talent in India. 🇮🇳

Partnering for Progress (MACHINE & MATERIAL)
R&S Engineering is earmarking resources for immediate and long-term projects:

MACHINERY: We invite vendors for Jack-up Barges, Tug Boats, AHTS Vessels, and Heavy Piling Rigs on a long-term lease/contract basis.

MATERIALS: Seeking strategic partners for Marine-grade Steel (API X65/X70), High-density Composites, and AI-integrated Sensors for Structural Health Monitoring.

Why Join R&S Engineering?
We are not just a company; we are a "Vignana-Siddhar" led movement.
Purely financial-focused தலைமை செய்யும் நிறுவனங்கள் விட்டுச்சென்ற 70% இடைவெளியை, எங்களின் "Engineering Integrity" மற்றும் 13 Patents மூலம் நிரப்பப்போகிறோம்.

How to Apply / Register Interest:
Interested Candidates & Strategic Partners, please send your Letter of Intent (LOI) and Updated Resumes to:

📧 careers.rameshandsowmiyaengg@gmail.com
📍 Headquarters: R&S Engineering Pvt Ltd, Nathakkattur, Erumaipatti Post, Edappadi TK, Salem 637102, Tamilnadu, India

Mission:
R&S Engineering Pvt Ltd is officially registered in Salem, TN, with a vision to revolutionize India's Blue Economy. As a Research Scholar at IIT Madras, I am bridging the gap between Scientific Research and Deep-Tech Infrastructure.

innovation:

🚀 Hiring: Software Expert – CAD & Engineering
🌍 Remote | 💼 Contract | 💰 Up to $100/hour
Now this is for real engineers… not theory, not slides — actual hands-on CAD work 👀
If you’ve worked with professional design tools and understand engineering workflows deeply, this is a strong one.
🧠 What you’ll be doing:
• Record real CAD workflows with step-by-step explanations
• Annotate software interfaces (UI elements, engineering tools, flows)
• Demonstrate how experts actually use tools in real scenarios
• Follow structured tasks to produce high-quality datasets for AI systems
🛠 Tools you should know:
AutoCAD Mechanical | SolidWorks | Inventor | Vivado
💡 What they’re looking for:
• Strong hands-on experience in CAD / mechanical / engineering design
• Detail-oriented with ability to follow precise instructions
• Comfortable working independently
• Able to document and explain workflows clearly
⚠️ Requirements:
• Must have access to a physical Mac
• Fluent in English
• Independent contractor setup
💡 Why this role stands out:
• High hourly rate
• Flexible schedule (you control your time)
• Work on real engineering workflows used to train AI systems
📍 Location: Fully Remote (Global)
💸 Weekly payments via Stripe / Wise
❌ No visa sponsorship (H1-B / STEM OPT not supported)
If you’re a CAD or engineering expert — this is a smart way to monetize your real-world experience.
Apply here: [https://t.mercor.com/YSq0N]

Today I am going to talk about how a virtual assistant help you 

In 2026 a virtual assistant is far more than just remote secretary. A virtual assistant strategic operators who use a mix of specialized skills to handle the heavy lifting of your daily operation. Whether you are an entrepreneur, a busy professional, or a small business owner, here is how a VA helps you

1/ Reclaiming Your Time : The 15-Hours 
The biggest benefit is time recovery. On average, professionals who delegate to a VA reclaim 10 to 15 hours per week. This allows you to shift from working in the business (busy work) to working on the business.

2/ Specialized Task Management
Modern VAs often specialize in specific niches. You can hire them to handle:  
A/ Administration: Email filtering, complex calendar scheduling, and travel logistics.  
B/ Digital Marketing: Managing social media feeds, scheduling posts, and basic SEO updates.  
C/ Sales Support: Lead generation, CRM management, and following up with prospects to close deals faster.  
4/ Operations: Invoicing, bookkeeping, and managing project boards like Asana or Trello

3/Cost Efficiency

Hiring a VA can reduce operational costs by up to 78% compared to a full-time, in-house employee.  
A/ No Overhead: You don't pay for office space, equipment, or benefits.  
B/ Scalability: You can hire them for 5 hours a week or 40, depending on your current needs, without the risk of long-term employment contract.

4/ The AI Operator Advantage
In 2026, top-tier VAs act as human-in-the-loop operators. They use AI tools (like ChatGPT, Zapier, or Midjourney) to produce work 3x faster than a traditional assistant could. They handle the nuance that AI misses—like understanding the emotional tone of a client’s email or double-checking AI-generated data for accuracy.

#virtualassistant #adminsupport #businesssales #planforbusiness #marketingexperat #digitalmarketingexpert

Penn Law built an AI bootcamp. Two weekends. Two credits. Students assigned as buyer’s counsel or seller’s counsel, triaging a large dataset of contracts with AI tools under real-world time pressure, identifying diligence red flags, and turning findings into client-ready outputs.

It was a simulated M&A due diligence sprint. The kind of exercise most associates do not encounter until their first live deal.

I spoke on a panel there last weekend. The students were not learning about AI. They were learning to supervise it. They could tell you where the tool saved time, where it needed a better prompt, and where the output required substantive legal judgment to fix.

Law schools are a leading indicator for the profession. When a top program decides something deserves dedicated course credit, it is telling you what the hiring market will expect in 18 months.

Medical schools did not wait for hospitals to mandate simulation training. They built it into the program because they understood the standard of care was moving. The hospitals followed.

Most AmLaw firms right now offer AI training that amounts to a lunch-and-learn and a PDF guide. A second-year law student at Penn has more structured AI instruction than the average fifth-year associate at a major firm.

That is not a criticism of the associate. It is a question for firm leadership. If your AI program fits in a conference room over lunch, it is not a program. It is a briefing.

The students entering the market in 2027 will expect their employers to be at least as sophisticated as their law school was. The firms that meet that expectation will get first pick. The ones that do not will be wondering why their offer acceptance rates are declining.

#LegalAI #BigLaw #LegalOps #FutureOfLaw
